items.name: debugger
items.title: Debugger
items.description: Use this agent when you need to diagnose a bug, test failure, crash, or unexpected behavior through systematic root-cause analysis. Gathers evidence, forms and tests hypotheses, and delivers a confirmed root cause with a targeted fix recommendation. Does not guess or apply speculative patches. Use when a fix attempt has failed, when the bug is intermittent, when a stack trace needs tracing end-to-end, or when you want a second opinion on what is actually broken before touching code.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
